calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-02-2026 Off Calendar

DEFAULT HEARING (PROVE UP)
Off Calendar Jan-07-2026 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar being set for plaintiff's request for entry of default judgment.

Judge Michelle Tong; Clerk: Damon Carter; Dept. 505 - Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 9:43am pausing at 9:48am resuming at 9:57am and concluding at 10:14am.

Plaintiff ODK Capital, LLC appearing represented by Zhen Ren, Esq. via Zoom.
Defendants XICOMM LLC & Seyedmohammad Reza not appearing.

Counsel for Plaintiff presents summary of case and an offer of proof.

The matter is submitted.

Based on the documents filed, the statement made by Plaintiff and its Counsel, consideration and good cause appearing, the Court RULES in favor of Plaintiff ODK Capital, LLC, and against Defendants jointly and severally XICOMM LLC & Seyedmohammad Reza as follows:

Damages: $170,795.71
Prejudgment Interest: $0
Attorney Fees: $0
Costs: $580.22

TOTAL JUDGMENT: $171,375.93

Proposed judgment signed and filed this date.
